location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a usable file:line, e.g. 'src/sync.py:14' and 'src/report.py:11'.

interaction_synthesis.why: The sync.py:39 finding mechanistically links two defects—the bare `pass` 'silently swallows all sync failures, hiding the errors now made more likely by the f-string query' at line 35.

causal_clarity.why: Each finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. the mutable default 'seen=[]' is 'shared across all calls, so IDs synced in one call are wrongly skipped as "duplicates" on every subsequent call.'
